dj_text: Hot For Teacher (Medieval version) [Bardcore], and now We Are The Champions (Medieval version) [Bardcore]. The Django demands it. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: Hey, weary travelers and court jesters of the airwaves!
hijack_text: From Cosmic Connection Radio, spinning out on Zulu Space Cha
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: We Are The Champions (Medieval version) [Bardcore]
